title: PolyAPI Client Function
description: A client function is a shared function that runs wherever it is executed, rather than in the PolyAPI cloud infrastructure.

id.description: The unique identifier of the client function.

name.description: The name of the client function.

description.description: A description of what the client function does.

context.description: The context path for organizing the function in the catalog.

language.description: The programming language of the function.

state.description: The lifecycle state of the function.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the function was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the function was last updated.
